_meta.assumptions: memory cost = spell tier (game convention). Bard songs have no tier on the wiki -> cost null, excluded from memory math. Sorcerer merged spells are created in-dungeon by combining casts -> cost null.
_meta.hit_fields: hits: [{label, base, scaling, heal?}] — damage = (base + staff Magical Damage) * (1 + MagicalPowerBonus% * scaling%), heals ignore the dummy
_meta.patch_level: Balance numbers updated to Patch 6.12 / EA Season 10 (2026-07-17) from official Steam notes. New 6.12 spells (Wizard: Transmutation, Sleep, Frost Wave, Fly, Polymorph, Teleport, Meteor Strike; Cleric: Withering Word, Blessed Fare, Divine Grace, Veil of Judgment, Radiant Blade, Divine Barrier, Miracle) NOT yet added — wiki/darkerdb still pre-6.12; add when sources update.

wizard.name: Zap
wizard.description: Deals 15 Light Magical Base Damage and burns the target for 1s, dealing 1 Fire Magical Base Damage.

wizard.name: Light Orb
wizard.description: Cast spheres of floating light that travel to brightly illuminate your surroundings for 40s. Also reveals allied and enemy hidden Rogues within 3m, ignoring walls.

wizard.name: Magic Lock
wizard.description: Lockable objects such as doors or boxes will be locked for 10s.

wizard.name: Slow
wizard.description: Cause the target to suffer -40% Move Speed Bonus for 2s.

wizard.name: Ignite
wizard.description: Set the target's weapon on fire for 12s. While active, deal 5 Fire Magical Base Damage and burn enemies for 1 Fire Magical Base Damage over 1s on successful attacks.

wizard.name: Ice Bolt
wizard.description: Deal 20 Projectile Ice Magical Base Damage with 4 Impact Power and inflict -20% Move Speed Bonus and -20% Action Speed for 1s. Projectile speed 14m/s.

wizard.name: Magic Missile
wizard.description: Channel up to 3s while still, firing a homing missile every 0.3s that each deal 10 Projectile Arcane Magical Base Damage with 2 Impact Power. Projectile speed 7m/s.

wizard.name: Haste
wizard.description: Grants the target 5% Move Speed Bonus, 10% Action Speed and 10% Spell Casting Speed for 6s. Self-cast if no target found.

wizard.name: Lightning Strike
wizard.description: A bolt of lightning falls in the targeted area after 0.5s, dealing 25 Lightning Magical Base Damage in a 0.8m blast radius and inflicting -20% Move Speed Bonus for 1s.

wizard.name: Invisibility
wizard.description: Grants the target invisibility for 4s and 5% Move Speed Bonus. Self-cast if no target found.

wizard.name: Fireball
wizard.description: Shoot a fireball dealing 30 Projectile Fire Magical Base Damage on direct hit (6 Impact Power), or 10 Fire AoE damage with knockback and a 3-damage burn over 2s. Direct hits do not also splash. Projectile speed 12m/s.

wizard.name: Explosion
wizard.description: Place a mark that explodes after 3s, dealing 20 Fire Magical Base Damage in a 1m area plus a 3-damage burn over 2s. On a character it sticks until it explodes; removed with no damage if the Wizard dies or extracts.

wizard.name: Chain Lightning
wizard.description: Deal 30 Lightning Magical Base Damage, then bounce to a random target within 8m up to 3 times (25/25/20 by bounce). Targets suffer -20% Move Speed Bonus for 1s. Does not re-hit previous targets.

cleric.name: Protection
cleric.description: Target within 7m receives a 20 Physical Base Shield for 8s. Self-cast if no target found.

cleric.name: Bless
cleric.description: Target within 7m gains 2 All Attributes for 30s. Self-cast if no target found.

cleric.name: Divine Strike
cleric.description: Target within 7m gains 5 Divine Strike Damage for 12s. Self-cast if no target found.

cleric.name: Cleanse
cleric.description: Removes all harmful magic and poison effects from a target within 7m. Self-cast if no target found.

cleric.name: Lesser Heal
cleric.description: Heals a target within 7m for 20 Magical Base Healing. Self-cast if no target found.

cleric.name: Bind
cleric.description: Binds a target within 7m in place for 0.75s.

cleric.name: Holy Strike
cleric.description: Burst of light in an area within 7m, hitting all targets within 1m after 0.5s for 20 Divine Magical Base Damage and disorienting their vision over 4s.

cleric.name: Holy Light
cleric.description: Heal a target player within 7m for 35 Magical Base Healing, OR deal 100 Divine Magical Base Damage to an Undead monster in range. Cannot target self.

cleric.name: Sanctuary
cleric.description: Channel up to 5s while still, creating a 3.5m aura that pulses every 1s: heals players for 5 and deals 14 Divine damage to Undead monsters each pulse.

cleric.name: Locust Swarm
cleric.description: Channel a swarm in a 3m area within 7m for up to 6s, dealing 13 Divine Magical Base Damage/s and inflicting -50% incoming physical & magical healing.

cleric.name: Earthquake
cleric.description: Channel in a 2.5m area within 7m for up to 6s, dealing 7 Earth Magical Base Damage per step a target moves and inflicting -50% Move Speed Bonus.

cleric.name: Resurrection
cleric.description: Channel while still on a fallen ally, reviving them after 20s but with -99% Max Health Healing on revival. Requires a soul heart.

warlock.name: Power of Sacrifice
warlock.description: Curse the target for 3 Curse/Evil Hybrid damage per second while granting them 15 Strength and 15 Vigor for 12s. Self-cast if no target found.

warlock.name: Curse of Weakness
warlock.description: Curse the target: -25% All Attributes Bonus, -15% Physical DR Mod and -15% Magical DR Mod for 12s.

warlock.name: Bolt of Darkness
warlock.description: Fire a bolt dealing 20 Projectile Dark Magical Base Damage. Can be shot down by other projectiles, detonating early.

warlock.name: Curse of Pain
warlock.description: Curse the target for 15 Evil/Curse Hybrid damage over 8s. If not already cursed, they instantly take 15 Evil damage.

warlock.name: Bloodstained Blade
warlock.description: Target gains 5 Physical Buff Weapon Damage for 20s but takes 3 Evil damage on each swing. Self-cast if no target found.

warlock.name: Spell Predation
warlock.description: Consume all removable magical buffs on the enemy; per status removed, gain 1 Darkness Shard and deal 3 Evil damage.

warlock.name: Evil Eye
warlock.description: Channel to summon a pilotable Evil Eye monster for 30s. While controlling it, the caster stands still and vulnerable.

warlock.name: Ray of Darkness
warlock.description: Channel a dark beam up to 5s, dealing 12 Dark Magical Base Damage/s to anything it touches. Can move and aim while channeling.

warlock.name: Life Drain
warlock.description: Channel up to 7.5s, dealing 5 Evil damage/s to the target and converting 100% of it into your health.

warlock.name: Hellfire
warlock.description: Blast eternal hellfire at the target, dealing 60 Fire Magical Base Damage/s (12 Impact Power) to anything in the area.

warlock.name: Flame Walker
warlock.description: For 6s, leave a trail of hellfire; each step leaves a 4s-lasting flame. Targets entering it burn.

warlock.name: Eldritch Shield
warlock.description: Grant the target a 25 Magical Base Shield for 15s. When it fully absorbs, gain 30% Dark Power Bonus and 50% Spell Casting Speed for the next dark spell within 6s.

warlock.name: Summon Hydra
warlock.description: Summon a Hydra that spits fireballs dealing 10 Projectile Fire damage (4 Impact Power) for 10s.

sorcerer.name: Fire Arrow
sorcerer.description: Fire homing arrows every 0.2s for 0.6s, each dealing 8 Projectile Fire damage and inflicting Burn (5 fire over 3s).

sorcerer.name: Stone Skin
sorcerer.description: Surround yourself in stone for 12s: +10% Physical DR and +10% Physical Power Bonus, but -5 Move Speed Add.

sorcerer.name: Water Bolt
sorcerer.description: Launch a water orb (6m/s) dealing 15 Projectile Ice damage and inflicting Wet for 2s (-20% Move Speed, -30% jump). Up to 3 orbs; 7m range.

sorcerer.name: Glaciate
sorcerer.description: Envelop your weapon in ice for 12s: deal 3 Ice damage and inflict Frostbite (-5% Move Speed, -20% Action Speed) on hit.

sorcerer.name: Windblast
sorcerer.description: Channel 0.6s, then deal 10 Air damage to a target within 4m and push them back.

sorcerer.name: Eruption
sorcerer.description: Ground explosion up to 4m away (0.8m wide) dealing 20 Earth damage and lifting all targets into the air after 0.85s.

sorcerer.name: Flamestrike
sorcerer.description: Create a 1s fire pillar dealing 30 Fire on creation and 10 Fire/s (6 Impact Power) inside, inflicting Burn (3 fire over 3s).

sorcerer.name: Ice Spear
sorcerer.description: Fire a piercing ice spear (16.5m/s) dealing 30 Projectile Ice damage and inflicting Frostbite (-20% Move Speed, -20% Action Speed) for 2s.

sorcerer.name: Fire Orb
sorcerer.description: Launch a slow fire orb dealing 5 Fire/s nearby; on contact deals 45 Projectile Fire (12 Impact Power) then explodes for 10 more plus Burn. 7m range.

sorcerer.name: Lightning Bolt
sorcerer.description: Channel a beam for 5s while moving, dealing 7 Lightning/s to a target within 7m and inflicting Electrified (-20% Move Speed for 1s).

sorcerer.name: Vortex
sorcerer.description: Create a vortex on the caster: targets touching it take 15 Air damage and are pushed back.

sorcerer.name: Levitation
sorcerer.description: Lift a target within 7m into the air over 1s, then gently lower them over 3s.

sorcerer.name: Lightning Sphere
sorcerer.description: Surround yourself with a field for 5s, dealing 5 Lightning/s to targets within 1.75m and inflicting Electrified.

sorcerer.name: Summon Earth Elemental
sorcerer.description: Summon an Earth Elemental (7m range) for 18s that grants you 50 Armor Rating and deals 40 Projectile Physical damage to nearby enemies.

druid.name: Nature's Touch
druid.description: Target receives 15 Recoverable Health and 15 Magical Base Healing over 12s. 7m range.

druid.name: Barkskin Armor
druid.description: Grant target (self if none) 50 Armor Rating for 10s and 10% Headshot Damage Reduction.

druid.name: Orb of Nature
druid.description: Fire an orb (14m/s) dealing 15 Spirit damage to an enemy, or granting Nature's Touch to an ally on contact.

druid.name: Dreamfire
druid.description: Deal 15 Spirit damage in a 0.8m area within 7m after 0.5s. Allies/self with Nature's Touch within 7m are healed 10 per enemy hit.

druid.name: Thorn Barrier
druid.description: Create a 2m thorn barrier for 4s dealing 4 Physical damage/s to anything touching it. 6 Impact Endurance. 7m range.

druid.name: Entangling Vines
druid.description: Spread roots in a 1m area after 0.75s; targets passing through are rooted for 1s, then gain 1s immunity. One at a time. 7m range.

druid.name: Restore
druid.description: Allies within 3m (including you) are healed for 20 Magical Base Healing over 12s.

druid.name: Summon Treant
druid.description: Summon a mobile Treant within 7m for 12s that deals 35.2 damage (4 Impact Power) per hit and has Demolition.

druid.name: Tree of Life
druid.description: Sprout a tree on a player within 7m granting 3 All Attributes, 20 Recoverable Health and 15 Magical Base Healing over 8s.

druid.name: Mending Grove
druid.description: Create a 3m forest around you for 7s: targets inside gain 10% Max Health Bonus and heal 10/s.

bard.name: Rousing Rhythms
bard.description: Grant all allies in range 2 All Attributes for 60s/120s/240s (by performance quality).

bard.name: Din of Darkness
bard.description: Deal 1/3/5 Dark Magical Base Damage per beat to enemies in range during a 7.36s channel.

bard.name: Beats of Alacrity
bard.description: Grant self 4/5/6 Move Speed Add for 60s/120s/240s.

bard.name: Allegro
bard.description: Grant allies stacking 3%/4%/5% Action Speed and Spell Casting Speed (max 3 stacks).

bard.name: Accelerando
bard.description: Grant allies stacking 2/3/4 Move Speed Add per stack (max 3 stacks).

bard.name: Unchained Harmony
bard.description: Open all doors/containers in range, including locked containers (not locked doors).

bard.name: Shriek of Weakness
bard.description: Reduce enemy Physical Power, Armor Rating and Physical Damage Reduction for 6s/12s/18s.

bard.name: Piercing Shrill
bard.description: Deal 20/25/30 Physical Base Damage to enemies and inflict an echo effect on players.

bard.name: Banshees Howl
bard.description: Cause enemies/monsters in range (except sub-boss/boss) to suffer -1/-2/-3 All Attributes for 20s.

bard.name: Song of Silence
bard.description: Silence all enemies/monsters in range for 1s/1.5s/2s.

bard.name: Peacemaking
bard.description: Channel 5s; all characters in range lose the ability to fight or attack.

bard.name: Lament of Languor
bard.description: Cause enemies/monsters in range to suffer -10 Move Speed Add for 6s/12s/18s.

bard.name: Chaotic Discord
bard.description: Channel 5s causing monsters to attack the nearest non-performer target.

bard.name: Tranquility
bard.description: Grant allies healing restoration while resting for 10s/20s/30s.

bard.name: Song of Shadow
bard.description: Grant all allies in range invisibility for 10s/20s/30s.

bard.name: Harmonic Shield
bard.description: Grant self 3%/4%/5% Physical and Magical Damage Reduction for 60s/120s/240s.

bard.name: Chorale of Clarity
bard.description: Grant allies Spell Point restoration while resting for 8s/16s/24s.

bard.name: Ballad of Courage
bard.description: Grant all allies 5/7/10 Physical Power for 6s.
